name: Chest CT Mediastinum With Contrast
description: Chest CT with contrast focused on mediastinal evaluation

findings.technique: CT of the chest with intravenous contrast was performed with mediastinal windows.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Mediastinal Fat
sections.content: Mediastinal fat [is clear / no mass / no infiltration].

sections.name: Lymph Nodes
sections.content: Mediastinal lymph nodes [are not enlarged / no pathologic adenopathy]. Short-axis diameter <10mm.

sections.name: Thymus
sections.content: Thymus [is normal / no mass / no thymoma].

sections.name: Heart and Vessels
sections.content: Heart chambers [are normal / no mass]. Great vessels [are normal / no aneurysm].

impression:
1. No mediastinal mass or lymphadenopathy.
2. Normal mediastinal CT.
